info.name: Astro Trading API — execution flow
info.description:
Ordered manual smoke test for the Astro FastAPI service.

**Prerequisites**
1. Run the API from the **Astro project directory** (folder with `pyproject.toml`): `python scripts/run_api.py`.
2. IB Gateway or TWS running (paper port 7497 by default); match `astro/configs/ibkr.yaml`.
3. `OPENAI_API_KEY` in `.env` in that same directory (for agent/decision routes).
4. Optional: `ASTRO_API_KEY` — if set, add header `X-API-Key` on **Execution → Place order** (collection variable `apiKey`).
5. On server start, the API **attempts IBKR connect** automatically. Set `ASTRO_SKIP_IBKR_CONNECT=1` to skip. `GET /system/health` shows `ibkr_connected` and `ibkr_connect_error`.
6. Data routes need `data/features/{symbol}_fused.parquet` under your configured `data_root` (usually `./data/` when cwd is the Astro project root).
7. Model predict needs `models/checkpoints/best.pt` and `scaler.npz`.

**Suggested flow**
Run folders **01 → 09** in order. After a successful decision, copy `decisionId` into the collection variable. Folder **10** is WebSocket/docs note.

**Import:** Postman → Import → this file. Set collection variables `baseUrl`, `symbol`, `tradeDate`, etc.

item.name: 01 — System (verify server + IBKR + model)
item.description: Start the API from the Astro project directory: `python scripts/run_api.py` (loads `.env`). Health reflects shared IBKR session from startup.

request.description: Returns `status`, `ibkr_connected` (true if startup connect succeeded), `ibkr_connect_error` (if connect failed or ib-insync missing), `model_loaded` (checkpoint exists).
YAML merge: system, agents, model, risk, ibkr (password fields stripped).

item.name: 02 — Data (Parquet features)
item.description: Requires fused feature file on disk.

request.description: OHLCV-oriented slice from fused data where available.
Runs inference on latest window from fused Parquet; validates schema vs registry.

item.name: 04 — Agents (LLM slices)
item.description: Individual agent stages; each call is stateless on the server.

request.description: Bull/bear debate + investment plan (full graph slice).

body.raw:
{
  "company_of_interest": "{{symbol}}",
  "trade_date": "{{tradeDate}}",
  "market_report": "Stub market summary.",
  "sentiment_report": "Stub sentiment.",
  "news_report": "Stub news.",
  "fundamentals_report": "Stub fundamentals.",
  "investment_plan": "Stub plan.",
  "trader_investment_plan": "Stub trader plan.",
  "astro_context": { "symbol": "{{symbol}}", "as_of": "{{tradeDate}}" }
}

request.description: Supply reports manually or paste outputs from analysts/research steps.

item.name: 05 — Decision (full pipeline)
item.description: End-to-end: context build → executor → policy → logging → DB row. Heavy LLM usage.

request.description: Omit `mode` to use `decision_mode_default` from agents.yaml. Response includes `decision_id` — copy into collection variable `decisionId` for replay.

item.name: 06 — Replay
item.description: Fetch logged decision by SQLite id or JSON filename.

request.description: Uses row from MetadataDB written during `/decision/run`.
`fused_path` relative to process cwd (Astro project root when using run_api.py).

item.name: 09 — Execution (IBKR paper)
item.description: Requires connected IBKR (startup or lazy connect here). API allows only `ibkr.paper: true`. If `ASTRO_API_KEY` is set, set header `X-API-Key: {{apiKey}}`.

header.description: Required only when env ASTRO_API_KEY is set; leave empty otherwise.

request.description: Uses shared IB client from server startup when available. Change `idempotencyKey` for a new order attempt.

item.name: 10 — WebSocket (heartbeat)
item.description: In Postman: New → WebSocket → `ws://localhost:8000/ws/stream` (adjust host if needed). Not representable as REST in this collection v2.1.

request.description: Use Swagger UI or a WebSocket client. Endpoint: `ws://host:port/ws/stream`.
